title: VG design structural JSON (v1)
description: Unified node-tree output from design extractors (HTML cheerio AST, PNG OCR box-list, Pencil MCP, Penboard MCP, legacy XML/PB parsers). Compared by drift validators (D-03 wave-scoped, D-12b per-wave, D-12e holistic) against UI-MAP as-built scan from generate-ui-map.mjs. Each node represents a structural element with optional bounding box (for visual sources) and props (for semantic sources).

tag.description: Element/component name. HTML: lowercase tag (div, button). Pencil/Penboard: shape type or component name. PNG OCR: region_type.

id.description: Optional stable node id (HTML id attr, Pencil/Penboard node id).

text.description: Static text content. For PNG OCR: extracted text with confidence ≥ cutoff (default 0.6). null if dynamic.

bbox.description: Bounding box in source coordinate space. Populated for png-structural/pencil-*/penboard-*; absent for html.

style.description: Visual properties (fill, fontSize, padding, etc.) for visual-source nodes.

props.description: Semantic props (data-* attrs for HTML; entity bindings for Penboard).
